name: Cardboard Chronicles
short_description: Welcome to Doodleburg! You play Doodle, a child who has been transported into a cardboard world of their own creation. Not all is well in the Burg of Doodle. An ancient, extradimensional evil has awoken and it's up to you to save this idyllic town from its ravenous rampage.
detailed_description:
A puzzle adventure game all about thinking inside the box. In a world made entirely of cardboard and doodles, you are the one who created it all. A child with nothing else to play with but some boxes and crayons gets spirited away into their imaginary world and becomes a doodle themselves! Smash and fling your way through puzzles as you help the strange characters you meet on the way to freeing yourself in Cardboard Chronicles!

Take control of Doodle to interact with eccentric NPCs, solves simple, yet engaging puzzles, use your slam abilities to smack enemies and objects, and defend Doodleburg from an encroaching evil that threatens to destroy your cardboard world.
